system.description: A tool of war has served the Battle-Brother in countless victories and is always at his side. Select one item from the Armoury, excluding unusual ammunition, with a Requisition cost up to the appropriate tier.
system.benefit: Signature Wargear makes one chosen item standard issue for the Battle-Brother and may be purchased multiple times for different items. The base tier allows an item up to 20 Requisition, Master increases the limit to 40 Requisition and grants an additional effect while equipped, and Hero permanently entrusts the Battle-Brother with a prestigious item up to 70 Requisition.
